name: Tuscan Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare your favorite tuna salad.
2. Add chopped sun-dried tomatoes and grated Parmesan cheese to the tuna salad.
3. Mix in balsamic vinegar until well combined.
4. Garnish with toasted pine nuts before serving.
5. Serve with light pasta salad or tomatoes with basil.
